title: Chapter 56
content:
Chapter 56: Chapter 56: The Portal Above the Bed

The moonlight filtered through the window, casting cool, silver bars across the wooden floor. Kai lay back against his headboard, his hands folded behind his head, basking in the hum of his new stats. The feeling of

Strength 19 was intoxicating—a coiled spring of power waiting to be unleashed.

But as the adrenaline faded, his mind wandered to his other acquisitions.

"System," Kai whispered into the quiet room. "Open Harem Interface."

[Ding!]

A sleek, rose-gold holographic panel materialized in the air above his chest. It was no longer empty.

[Harem Members: 2]

Kai swiped through the profiles.

Slot 1: Lin Mei (Mrs. Lin)

Role:

The Submissive Neighbor

Status:

Owned / Training in Progress

Location:

Nearby (Home)

Kai nodded. Mrs. Lin was a reliable source of comfort and XP, accessible whenever he walked next door.

He swiped left.

Slot 2: Ahena (The Weeping Matriarch)

Role:

The Demoness Consort

Status:

Contracted / Sexually Awakened

Location:

Demon Realm (The Crimson Void)

Kai’s eyes narrowed as he noticed a button glowing beneath Ahena’s portrait. It was a feature that Mrs. Lin’s profile lacked.

[SUMMON]

"Interesting," Kai mused, tapping his chin. "Mrs. Lin is a human living in the physical world. I have to physically go to her. But Ahena... she’s a spirit entity bound by a soul contract."

He hovered his finger over the glowing button.

"Anytime, anywhere, huh?"

A mischievous smirk spread across his face. He was in his bedroom, locked away from the world. His mother was asleep (or fantasizing) in the next room. It was the perfect time for a test run.

"Let’s see my new pet."

Kai pressed the button.

[Initiating Summoning Ritual...]

[Cost: 0 Mana (Contract Active)]

The air in the bedroom changed instantly. The temperature spiked, replacing the cool night air with a blast of dry, static heat. The shadows on the ceiling began to swirl, twisting into a vortex of black and crimson energy.

ZZZ-CRACK.

A silent rift tore open directly above the bed.

"Whoaaaa!"

A startled yelp echoed from the void.

Gravity took over immediately. A flash of red skin and flailing limbs dropped from the ceiling.

WHUMP.

Ahena landed on the mattress right beside Kai. The bedsprings groaned under the sudden weight, bouncing Kai slightly.

"Fuck!" Ahena hissed, scrambling to untangle herself from her own limbs. She shook her head, her long obsidian horns scraping the headboard. "That was a rough pull! Next time, give a girl a warning!"

She pushed her hair out of her face and looked around, her yellow eyes adjusting to the dim light of the mortal realm.

She spotted Kai lying next to her, looking amused.

Ahena froze. A slow, realization dawned on her face. Her tail flicked excitedly behind her.

"Master?" she purred, her voice dropping to a sultry whisper. "You? You summoned me?"

She crawled up the bed on her hands and knees, looming over him.

"Of course me," Kai replied, admiring the view. "Who else would have the authority to yank a Demon Queen out of her world?"

Ahena giggled, the sound like wind chimes made of bone. "True. Only the man who broke me gets to call me."

She sat back on her heels, posing for him.

Kai scanned her body. She was just as breathtaking as she had been in the dormitory. Her skin was a flawless, deep ruby red. Her curves were exaggerated and dangerous.

But something was different.

In the dormitory, she had been completely naked, displaying everything. Now, she wore a single garment. A pair of incredibly sheer, black lace panties clung to her hips, barely concealing the swollen mound between her legs.

Her breasts, however, were still magnificently bare.

They hung heavy and proud, defying gravity with their demonic perkiness. The nipples were dark, almost black, and hard as stones. They swayed slightly as she moved, mesmerizing Kai.

"Damn," Kai breathed, reaching up to trace the air near her chest. "Those tits look delicious."

Ahena laughed, a throaty sound of pure vanity.

"Of course they are, Master," she preened.

She reached up with both hands. She cupped her own massive breasts, pushing them together. The red flesh spilled over her fingers, creating a deep, sinful cleavage. She squeezed them, making the nipples point directly at Kai’s face.

"They are full of demonic Yin energy," she teased, rubbing them against each other. "Soft... warm... and waiting for your hands."

Kai watched the display, feeling his blood rush south. But his curiosity got the better of him. He pointed to her hips.

"Why the panties?" Kai asked, raising an eyebrow. "You weren’t shy about showing off your pussy before. Did you suddenly find some modesty in the Demon Realm?"

Ahena stopped playing with her breasts. She looked down at the scrap of black lace covering her crotch.

Her expression softened. The demonic arrogance faded, replaced by a look of genuine, possessive devotion.

"No, Master. It is not modesty."

She crawled forward until she was straddling his legs, her weight settling on his thighs. She leaned down, her face inches from his.

"Before you came, my pussy was a curse. It was open to the air, but closed to the world. A useless void."

She ran a sharp fingernail lightly down Kai’s chest, tracing his abs.

"But you filled it. You claimed it."

She smiled, a wicked, secret smile.

"Now, it belongs to you. I cover it because I don’t want the air, or the spirits, or even my own eyes to see it too easily. It is your private temple now."

She leaned back, spreading her thighs, letting him see the outline of her slit through the sheer fabric.

"Only you get to take these off, Kai. Only you get to see the mess you made inside me. Haha..."

Kai felt a surge of dominance rush through him.

"Is that so?" Kai grinned, reaching out to hook his finger under the waistband of the lace. "Then I guess I should inspect my property."
